title: Sensitive Port 21 Open — FTP
description: Port 21/tcp (ftp) is publicly accessible on fd.somaiya.com. FTP — cleartext file transfer. Sensitive services exposed to the internet are prime targets for brute-force, exploitation, and lateral movement.
action: Immediately restrict port 21 to internal network or VPN only via firewall rules. If this service is not needed, disable it entirely.
